div.head: 222. Editorial Note
div.p: On June 18, 1962, Director of the Bureau of Intelligence and Research Hilsman transmitted RFE-27 to Assistant Secretary of State for Far Eastern Affairs Harriman. This was a progress report summarizing the major goals and accomplishments of the counter-insurgency program in South Vietnam. For text of this memorandum, see United States-Vietnam Relations, 1945-1967, Book 12, pages 469-480.
